_comment: Authoritative project facts (CONVENTIONS section 15), enforced by scripts/check_structure.py (check_H). pyverdex is mid-migration to the Project Keel structure: the backend currently lives in src/pyverdex (moves to src/backend in phase 2); the frontend (web/ -> src/frontend) and the REST transport (src/pyverdex/server -> api/rest_fastapi) are declared here as each phase lands. Per the refactor decision, LangGraph stays a CORE engine (kept, not demoted to an optional runtime adapter).
name: pyverdex
